dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 6862 IH: Protecting Health Care Workforce Pipelines Act
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Mr. Harder of California introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on Education and Workforce

form.official-title: To amend the Higher Education Act of 1965 to delay, until July 1, 2030, the termination of authority to award certain Federal Direct PLUS loans and the implementation of limits on certain loans for graduate and professional students enrolled at institutions with certain public health designations, and for other purposes.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Protecting Health Care Workforce Pipelines Act.
Section 455(a) of the Higher Education Act of 1965 (20 U.S.C. 1087e(a)) is amended—

subparagraph.text: by striking Subject to and inserting (i) In general.—Subject to; and
by adding at the end the following:

clause.header: Delay of termination for graduate and professional students at covered institutions

subclause.text: In the case of a graduate or professional student enrolled in a program of study at a covered institution, clause (i) shall be applied by substituting July 1, 2030 for July 1, 2026.
For purposes of this clause, the term covered institution means an institution—

subitem.text: is a health professions school (as defined in section 799B of the Public Health Service Act (42 U.S.C. 295p));
offers a health professions program (as defined in section 799B of the Public Health Service Act (42 U.S.C. 295p)); or
offers a nursing program described in section 811 of the Public Health Service Act (42 U.S.C. 296j); and

item.text: that is located within 100 miles of an area—

subitem.text: that is designated as a health professional shortage area under section 332(a)(1) of the Public Health Service Act (42 U.S.C. 254e(a)(1)); or
that serves a medically underserved community (as defined in section 799B of the Public Health Service Act (42 U.S.C. 295p)).

paragraph.text: in paragraph (4), by adding at the end the following:

subparagraph.header: Delay of loan limits for graduate and professional students at covered institutions
subparagraph.text: In the case of a graduate or professional student enrolled in a program of study at a covered institution (as such term is defined in paragraph (3)(C)(ii)(II))—

clause.text: subparagraph (A) shall be applied by substituting July 1, 2030 for July 1, 2026; and
subparagraph (B) shall be applied by substituting July 1, 2030 for July 1, 2026.
